abstracts.abstract: Public Records/Body Camera Recordings Recorded by a Code Inspector;  Providing an exemption from public records requirements for body camera recordings recorded by a code inspector under certain circumstances; providing exceptions; requiring a local government to retain body camera recordings for a specified timeframe; providing for future legislative review and repeal of the exemption; providing a statement of public necessity, etc.

subject: subject index
bill.title: Public Records/Body Camera Recordings Recorded by a Code Inspector

action.description: Signed by Officers and presented to Governor
